SystemStatus.Description: Test failure, system status not correct

BarometricPressureOutOfRangeHigh.Description: Barometric pressure out of range - high

BarometricPressureOutOfRangeLow.Description: Barometric pressure out of range - low

EngineCoolantTemperatureOutOfRangeHigh.Description: Engine coolant temperature too high - Abort

EngineCoolantTemperatureOutOfRangeLow.Description: Engine coolant temperature too low - Abort

EngineOilTemperatureOutOfRangeHigh.Description: Engine oil temperature out of range - high

EngineOilTemperatureOutOfRangeLow.Description: Engine oil temperature out of range - low

OxygenSensor1Bank1OutOfRangeLow.Description: O2 Sensor 1 Bank 1 reading out of limits - low

VINMismatch.Description: ECM VIN does not match scanned VIN

SerialNumberMismatch.Description: Serial Number does not match file

StartModuleKeepAliveFail.Description: Failed to start keep alive thread
